{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell's previous owner was called the Splitter, known for their mastery over mirror images. Under their influence, Snail Shell also had a similar feature that enhances the wielder's mirror images.
|affct=CIV
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=2680
|relic1=Buddha Tooth Sarira
|relic2=Holy Loaves
|relic3=Double Helix DNA
|relic4=Particle Collider
|relic5=Tyr's Arm
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Mutant
|element=Wind
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=HP
}}
